speaker: MATT
raw_text: (sigh, foreign words) Which you recognize as, "Tell the others: wait a day." And one of her servants wanders off behind you guys and exits the tent. She turns back to you. "Then what is to be done?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes. We offer profound apologies for waking you from your slumber again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Snaps her arm back into place. (cracking)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: In Draconic  we apologize for waking you up. Unfortunately, I sent my brother here before with our compatriot, and he spoke out of turn. We're actually planning the attack the day after tomorrow.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. You guys make your way up out of the ravine, up onto the top of the snowy banks at the top of where the cliffsides are. Eventually, over the next 20 or so minutes, finding the shimmering outskirts of Scanlan's doorway, joining the rest of the party.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, invisibility yet again. I'm out of 3rd-level spells.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is Pass Without a Trace still active on us? It's up to an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah it'd still be active.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As they're leaving, not wanting to get left out, I fly down from the air and land in my sister's hair and like a cat (growls) into the top of her head five or seven or 12 times.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (caws)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So tangled.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Instantaneous bedhead. You can't even see it, but you can feel it and it bothers you. All right. You guys both are invisible, the bird clutching to your side. You take the broom back up into the snowy storm. I need you both to make stealth checks with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought we were invisible. We're invisible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I've made us invisible again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Big bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With advantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten to whatever you roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh snap! 12, 22--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as the spell finishes, the Sun Tree opens, you step through the portal into the slow crawling sunrise. The sun hasn't quite crested, but you can see through the snowfall, which is lessening at the moment, the distant light blue is getting lighter and lighter. You probably have another 30 minutes before the sun hits the actual horizon line. But as you step out of one of the trees that you created previous, when you had journeyed to the ruins of Draconia, you do see about 150 feet off, the shimmer of the outside of Scanlan's mansion door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can go now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that a new set of dice?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I had to go buy some because I left all of my stuff in New York. Let's see how this goes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You stopped on the way here to buy dice?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No, I got those a little earlier. We're okay. We're here. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So we Tree Stride back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Pike, you gather your materials, your armor, your weapons. All things that you feel would be necessary for this type of a conflict. You rejoin with Keyleth. The two of you find your way back to the Sun Tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right. So yeah, so the leader of Ravenites, her name is Tooma, and we went there, and we were talking to her, and I think we have a plan, but not really a plan, so we're going to figure it out as we go. All right? Let's go. That's the plan; you're caught up.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, great. Hey, guys. (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Technically, yeah. It's mid-afternoon by the time you guys finish your full rest, except for Percy. Percy is up before everybody else and is pacing about the mansion by himself probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Close the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Close the door, Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I just want to see what it is!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I slam it shut with my gauntlets.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, pushy!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We don't know what that was! Well, maybe you do, but I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm assuming that was Vorugal.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's a dragon!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, a big white dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Big white. Big dummy dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And you let it know we're here! (chuckles)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, that was an accident. I was going to surprise you guys. And we almost died.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But hey, we're not, so we need to get some sleep, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, everyone sleep now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys all go to rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. A full rest is taken for all of you. Everyone's healed back to full. Spells are recovered. Percy, you are now down to a minus two, I believe, penalty to your rolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wake up and it's two in the afternoon?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 28? Looking about, there are a number of birds in the distance. There's some that have flown overhead since you've been here. Nothing that seems to be acting erratically or out of the ordinary. There's a couple that have come in a little close to watch, and then went off their own way, curious as to what's going down in the ravine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't poof within the mansion. It has to be on the same plane of existence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But it's daylight, so it should be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The mansion's considered a pocket plane.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If Pike is going back as mist-- no offense, Pike-- can you find the mansion?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you go with her?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Gladly.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay. You'll know your mansion better.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Send the two bitties. And we're going to hide out. I'm still in my mist form.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you guys de-mist-ify?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we've been talking, so I'm going to say yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, clever elves, can you scout around, make sure we're not being watched?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There are no elves here. My mother was a human. Do you want to go right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I've been keeping an eye out, but yes, I will keep watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're not being watched? You sure those hawks are hawks?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is anything watching us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "No!" You help her get all armored up. She gets the rest of her stuff. She came relatively light, other than the materials she needs for combat. She's ready to go in the next 15 minutes or so. "All right. So. Where's this going down?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Disgusting.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She stands up. "Damn right, it is. Stringy."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We came back for you because he's going to build a mansion somewhere else.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We need to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay." She takes one of the pieces of chicken and pockets it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That will disappear when we leave here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (groans) Pulls it out. Sucks it off the bone and throws it to the ground. It clatters off to the side. "All right, let me grab my stuff." And she goes and gets her armor and starts putting it on. "Do you want to help me?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: To hold some stuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Put the armor on! You know to put on plate. Come on." You help get her armor on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you need me to help, as well?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. As an Air Ashari, you have a very firm understanding of airflow, temperature of air, and how best it can quickly freeze water. Over time, utilizing the spells at your disposal, over the next 30 minutes or so, you do manage to coat the visible recently created stone with a layer of ice that in some regard would help, hopefully, camouflage it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One there, and one-- yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so those are the two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And about what, 40 feet up? 50 feet up?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'd say about 50 feet up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How about halfway up the mountain? I want to make it look rough, I want to try and camouflage it, and then I'm also going to help Percy and the rest of this excavation to use my Gust and little Create Water spells over top of it to start covering them with ice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm creating a breakable ice shield for when it's time, but I'm just giving the nice cover.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, cover it with ice to make it look like the rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Go ahead and just roll a wisdom check. Roll a d20 and add your wisdom modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He normally only asks me that when we're making a terrible plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know. Ooh! Check out the big brain!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Check out the big brains on Brad! 23.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "30 minutes. It will be done." He returns to the other two, and they begin to make their way rather briskly back towards the direction of Vorugal's lair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do they appear to be Ravenites?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: After a short time inspecting them, they appear to be Ravenite in structure, yeah. They are dragonborn, they are heavily robed, and they are coasting up along the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Vex, you want to talk to them? They might have told him. Might have been the ones that just told him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I walk over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you acknowledge them and begin to approach, one of them breaks from the two and they stay back. As it approaches you can see the tall burly dragonborn form, this is Skork. You met when you first came to the ruins of Draconia. He approaches. "Tooma sends me. When are we to tell the dragon the hunt is on?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're ready whenever you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Give us 30 minutes. And then do it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 16. Good to know. Okay. So you place him up there. What else are you guys doing? You have 30 minutes, 25 now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're ready whenever you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Give us 30 minutes. And then do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "30 minutes. It will be done." He returns to the other two, and they begin to make their way rather briskly back towards the direction of Vorugal's lair.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: When you see the dragon pop up into the sky and head this direction, start summoning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Percy? Up?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. I take Percy up top.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You bring Percy up onto the top. The rain is starting to come down hard now and you're instinctively getting chills and shivering a little bit. You get up into your little parapet area, place him there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I try to move some snow around and try to block it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy, I need you to make a stealth check. Just in general.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Who, me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, just Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 16.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Grog, any preparation you're doing for this? All righty. As time begins to tick down, 15 minutes left, ten minutes left--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you pour poison on a blade, do you get poison damage if you hit them with it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If there is a blade you can apply poison to, then yes, you would probably do a little bit of poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You know what, I want to pop Trinket out. I want him to be in the mansion with Pike and Grog. Go!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, you're in the mansion, as well? All righty. Kima is like (anticipation noise).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hide, Kima! Oh, she doesn't have an earring.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope. She joins you guys in the mansion for now. And Vax, you're hiding over behind that rock? Roll stealth, if you could.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You grasp onto the rock, and much like the elven cloaks in Lord of the Rings, you blend in with the stonework.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go meditate on disguised dwarves. Goodbye.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, Keyleth makes her way back into the mansion. All right. Five minutes. Four minutes. Three minutes. Two minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, any preparation you're doing for this? All righty. As time begins to tick down, 15 minutes left, ten minutes left--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I cast Enhance Ability on Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you're enhancing his?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Charisma.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And then I am going to move. We don't have anyone over here yet, really, correct?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. You have Percy up here but no one down there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'm going to-- fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Going to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hide behind the tree and stealth as much as I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, roll a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, shouldn't you hide in the mansion?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you become an animal?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shouldn't you hide right now? Just be out of the way until Vorugal--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can be an animal if you feel like you want eyes out here, as well, but I won't be able to go elemental.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Then no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ever?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Until I rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We've got eyes on. We're above. Just go hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, I go in the mansion.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been more than two rounds since this started.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm holding.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Going to use the rest of his action to climb up. Gets all the way to the top of the ravine, which is about at the same height that Vorugal is. Based on your help, I need you to roll another stealth check because you helped him for the last half hour. You have advantage because she was helping you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh! 13. 13, because I'm at a negative one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 13? That's worse than it was before!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yenk gets to the top and turns around and sees Vorugal off to the side, glances down and goes (foreign words). And is going to make a giant bowling underhand fist punch right towards you, Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was holding ready. Can I try and beat his initiative and get a shot off first?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As a reaction right now, you can go ahead and take a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's time to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Has it been two rounds?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Jenga!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as you clutch your holy symbol, concentrating, hoping that she's there, feeling the division between the gods and their followers since the Divergence occurred. You've reached out to her a number of times. You look up through the darkness of your closed eyes, and you see a light, a beacon open. The clouds part, and suddenly the sound of rain goes away. The sound of all the chaos goes away, and it's just warmth and quiet, and you watch as Sarenrae's hand comes down and touches your forehead, and with your closed eyes, and says, "I'll do what I can." As she drifts away and smiles, you watch as her hand turns into a fist, and she looks up and disappears into the light. As you open your eyes, you now see up in the sky above Vorugal, the clouds that are dark, a sparkle of divine energy begins to swirl. As it grows stronger and stronger, the clouds suddenly part, and a giant column of divine energy (boom) slams down, right on top of Vorugal. Vorugal looks up just in time to try to move out of the way before it slams him back. Does not make his dex save with a roll of five. Vorugal suffers 50 points of divine damage and is slammed onto the ground. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pop out. Maybe I can stay in there and do this, in the door, and try to cast Divine Intervention.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Divine Intervention? All right, so you step out and you see this chaos happen: the dragon in the air, the fiend on the side, swinging and barely missing a flying Vax, who swoops past in the middle of this sleet storm. You close your eyes and concentrate, holding your holy symbol, praying that Sarenrae has the ability to reach beyond the Divine Gate and lend you her strength temporarily. I need you to roll a d10.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Man, how awesome would this be?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It would be insane.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: A ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A zero?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, a zero.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (excited gasping) Shut the fuck up! She has to roll under her level, which she did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So this succeeded.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shut the fuck up, Ashley!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You watch as the hand of Sarenrae dissipates, some of the energy that's residual there lingers, and then forms into a flaming sword of pure golden-white energy. It is now hovering over the currently slammed-down, broken-looking body of Vorugal.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Stay down!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Holy fuck! Pike! That was amazing!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Action figure is down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Additional 26 points of bludgeoning damage. As the light column slams Vorugal to the ground, you can see some of the ice and snow underneath melts immediately, and what was once a column, you can see now looks like a giant fist made of spiritual energy that then withdraws slowly off the back of Vorugal and then dissipates before the clouds close up once more.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes! It worked!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's your movement and your action.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: For a bonus action, I would like to place a spiritual weapon at the back of his neck, since he's on the ground. And I would like it to be a very large flaming sword.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, that'll hit. Divine Intervention, man. Finally worked. Can't use it for a week, by the way, Pike, just so you're aware. Once it succeeds, you can't use it for a week.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 25 hits. Go ahead and roll 1d8 plus five.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, well, six. Sarenrae did the damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Six points of divine damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Sarenrae does 50 points of damage, and I do six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Through you, did 50 points. You're still part of it. All right, that ends Pike's turn. Vex, we're taking your turn because you weren't in the initiative order.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's okay. I'm going to cast Hunter's Mark on Vorugal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because dragons are your chosen enemy, I'm giving you the plus two damage against it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I'm hidden, technically, so I get sneak attack on him, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Currently, you have not been noticed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
